items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-76 westbound between 1 miles EAST of Exit 341: MONTGOMERY DR/WEST RIVER DRIVE and Exit 341: MONTGOMERY DR/WEST RIVER DRIVE. There is a lane restriction.
